xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnFinancialRe: For notes, refer PDF file uploaded on website.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfReportableSegment: Retail Banking operations - Other Retail Banking
Retail Banking operations - Other Retail Banking
Retail Banking operations - Other Retail Banking
Retail Banking operations - Other Retail Banking
Retail Banking operations - Other Retail Banking
Retail Banking operations - Other Retail Banking
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnSegmentsExp:
1. Segment Net Results are arrived after taking the effects of Transfer Pricing.
2. As per RBI Circular DOR.AUT.REC.12/22.01.001/2022-23 dated April 07, 2022, for the purpose of disclosure under Accounting Standard 17, Segment Reporting, 'Digital Banking' has been identified as a sub-segment under the 'Retail Banking Segment'.
